name: 万有引力与轨道
subject: physics
domain_name: 力学-转动与振动 Mechanics: Rotation/Oscillation
curriculum_points:
1.2.A.1
When using the object model, the size, shape, and internal configuration are ignored. The object may be treated as a single point with extensive properties such as mass and charge.

2.1.A.1
System properties are determined by the interactions between objects within the system.

2.1.A.2
If the properties or interactions of the constituent objects within a system are not important in modeling the behavior of the macroscopic system, the system can itself be treated as a single object.

2.1.A.3
Systems may allow interactions between constituent parts of the system and the environment, which may result in the transfer of energy or mass.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「万有引力与轨道」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1.2.A.1
When using the object model, the size, shape, and internal configuration are ignored. The object may be treated …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：2.1.A.1
System properties are determined by the interactions between objects wit… 对理解「万有引力与轨道」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
